commands.review_summary:
The PR adds field-scoped stripping of a terminal malformed `</arg_value>>` suffix from agent read/write/edit path arguments and exec command/routing arguments, with regression coverage for the active wrappers.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +211. Total +289 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main has no suffix sanitizer and forwards malformed exec/read argument strings unchanged through the active code paths. I did not live-reproduce the original Windows DashScope/Qwen emission.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the branch looks mechanically correct and the remaining action is maintainer draft/merge handling plus any desired WSL proof review.

target.title: fix(agents): strip malformed arg-value suffixes
target.body:
## Summary
- Strip the malformed terminal `</arg_value>>` marker from active read/write/edit path args and exec routing args before validation/guard checks.
- Preserve payload text fields (`content`, edit replacements, env values) so legitimate XML-like content is not rewritten.
- Cover the memory-flush append-only wrapper, workspace-root guard, read adaptive wrapper, and active exec tool path.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/48780.
Replaces the closed contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48792; credit to @zerone0x for the original direction and to @koden588-blip for the report.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.params.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.arg-value-suffix.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.workspace-root-guard.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.path.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/agent-tools.params.ts src/agents/agent-tools.params.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.arg-value-suffix.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.workspace-root-guard.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.path.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/agent-tools.params.ts src/agents/agent-tools.params.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.arg-value-suffix.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.workspace-root-guard.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.path.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean after two accepted findings were fixed.
- Manual CI: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26685872456
  - `checks-windows-node-test`: success
  - `checks-node-agentic-agents-tools`: success
  - Broad `check-lint`, `check-prod-types`, `check-test-types`, and `check-guards`: fail in `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.ts` plugin-sdk boundary dts; this branch does not touch that file.
- Windows/WSL probe: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26685872450
  - Native Windows probe: reached Windows Server 2025 runner and checked out this branch.
  - WSL2 probe: blocked by runner configuration (`HCS_E_HYPERV_NOT_INSTALLED` / Virtual Machine Platform unavailable), not by this patch.

Behavior addressed: Windows/native and WSL agent tool calls whose `read`/`exec` args arrive with a terminal malformed `</arg_value>>` marker no longer forward that marker into path, command, or routing fields.
Real environment tested: local focused Node/Vitest proof on the active tool wrappers; GitHub native Windows CI passed on this branch; WSL2 runner capability probe was attempted and blocked by missing Hyper-V/Virtual Machine Platform support on that runner.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: the focused `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ...` command above after rebase onto current `origin/main`, plus manual CI and Windows/WSL workflow dispatches linked above.
Evidence after fix: 5 focused Vitest files passed with 84 tests; autoreview clean with no accepted/actionable findings; native Windows CI passed `checks-windows-node-test`; agent-tools CI shard passed.
Observed result after fix: malformed suffixes are stripped only from terminal path/exec routing fields before validation and guard checks; suffix-only paths are rejected as missing path; payload text is preserved.
What was not tested: WSL2 execution inside a real WSL distro is still pending because the available GitHub Windows runner cannot create a WSL2 VM; local Blacksmith Testbox is unavailable because the local CLI reports `not authenticated`; Azure Crabbox Windows provisioning did not acquire a fresh lease before timeout.
target.author: vincentkoc
